ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "user_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL to the tweet */,
  "crisis_name" TEXT /* Name of the crisis associated with the tweet */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_location" TEXT /* Location of the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the tweet (e.g., original, retweet, reply) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_crisis_name FOREIGN KEY ("crisis_name") REFERENCES crises ("crisis_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "user_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "user_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "user_friends" INTEGER /* Number of friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crises" (
  "crisis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crisis */,
  "crisis_name" TEXT /* Name of the crisis */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the crisis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the crisis */,
  "crisis_type" TEXT /* Type of crisis (e.g., natural disaster, conflict) */,
  "crisis_description" TEXT /* Description of the crisis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crisis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet to which the attribute belongs */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the attribute */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label assigned to the attribute */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "label_code" TEXT /* Code for the label */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the attribute */,
  "human_labeled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute was human labeled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label for the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., misinformation, high engagement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the influencer */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is an influencer */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the influencer */,
  "influence_type" TEXT /* Type of influencer (e.g., media, public figure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " tweet_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the entity */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet to which the entity belongs */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., hashtag, url, mention) */,
  "entity_text" TEXT /* Text of the entity */,
  "entity_url" TEXT /* URL of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the media */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet to which the media belongs */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
